reason: Agent successfully used GitHub tool to retrieve authenticated user's GitHub username after granting account access
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded with sidebar showing agent list
Clicked agent "QA-20260401-164739-i4l2" in sidebar - Agent opened in chat view with "idle" status
Verified agent status is "idle" - Status displayed as "idle" in header and sidebar
Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." - Message accepted and agent began processing
Waited for access request card - Card appeared asking to grant GitHub account access
Clicked GitHub account checkbox - Account was selected (checkbox marked as checked)
Clicked "Grant Access" button - Agent resumed processing with GitHub access granted
Handled API request approval - Clicked "Allow" button for GET /user API request via GitHub
Waited for final response - Agent completed in 1m 45s
Verified response includes GitHub username - Response clearly displays "Your GitHub username is yiw190."
